commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: What St. Paul here addresses to Archippus, gives us reason to presume that he was then bishop of the Colossians, having succeeded Epaphras, who was then prisoner at Rome with St. Paul. (Bible de Vence)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: And say to Archippus, Take heed to the ministry which you have received in the Lord, that you fulfill it. Wherefore does he not write to him? Perhaps he needed it not, but only a bare reminding, so as to be more diligent.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
